message: Avoid weak hash algorithm 'md5'. For password storage use a password hashing function; for general hashing use SHA-256+.
remediation: For passwords: use bcrypt, scrypt, PBKDF2, or argon2 with salting (e.g. bcrypt.hashSync(password, 10)). For general hashing: crypto.createHash('sha256') or crypto.createHash('sha512').
